evidence: "As is almost always the case, the book is better than the movie."
"As a thriller, the film is good, not great."
"The movie is trying too hard to be cute and clever, but it is just annoying."
"The movie becomes a little slow moving and tiresome at times."
"Kodi Smit-McPhee is excellent in his role."
"This movie should have been nominated for some awards."
"I watched this film because I loved Midsommar."
"This movie is extremely creepy and will stick with you."
"My palms were sweating, while watching it."
"The last ten, or so, pages of the book are very emotional and moving."
"This is the most intense movie I've ever seen."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama and thriller genres, with a preference for emotional and intense narratives. They tend to favor slower pacing and are sensitive to production quality, although they show low brand loyalty to specific creators.
